parts.label: Front Brake Rotor — 318mm Vented (Left)
parts.function: Provides the friction surface for the front left brake caliper to clamp against, converting kinetic energy to heat.

parts.label: Front Brake Rotor — 318mm Vented (Right)
parts.function: Provides the friction surface for the front right brake caliper to clamp against, converting kinetic energy to heat.

parts.label: Front Brake Caliper — Brembo 4-Piston (Left)
parts.function: Hydraulically clamps brake pads against the front rotor to generate stopping force at the left front corner.

parts.label: Front Brake Caliper — Brembo 4-Piston (Right)
parts.function: Hydraulically clamps brake pads against the front rotor to generate stopping force at the right front corner.

parts.label: Front Brake Pads
parts.function: Friction material that contacts the rotor surface inside the Brembo caliper to decelerate the vehicle.

parts.label: Brake Master Cylinder
parts.function: Converts brake pedal force into hydraulic pressure distributed to all four brake calipers.

parts.label: Brake Booster (Vacuum Servo)
parts.function: Amplifies driver pedal input using vacuum assistance before force reaches the master cylinder.

parts.label: ABS/PSM Hydraulic Control Unit (Bosch)
parts.function: Modulates brake pressure at each wheel independently to prevent wheel lock-up and enable PSM stability interventions.

parts.label: Front Brake Lines — Hard Lines and Braided Flex Hoses
parts.function: Transmits hydraulic fluid pressure from the ABS unit to the front brake calipers.

parts.label: Brake Fluid Reservoir
parts.function: Stores and supplies brake fluid to the master cylinder while accommodating fluid volume changes as pads wear.

parts.label: Wheel Speed Sensor — Front Left
parts.function: Provides real-time front left wheel rotational speed data to the ABS/PSM control unit for slip detection.

parts.label: Wheel Speed Sensor — Front Right
parts.function: Provides real-time front right wheel rotational speed data to the ABS/PSM control unit for slip detection.

parts.label: Front Brake Dust Shield (Cover Plate) — Left
parts.function: Shields the front left brake rotor and caliper from road debris, splash water, and dirt ingress.

parts.label: Front Brake Dust Shield (Cover Plate) — Right
parts.function: Shields the front right brake rotor and caliper from road debris, splash water, and dirt ingress.

parts.label: Front Brake Caliper Repair Set (Seals & Pistons)
parts.function: Replacement seal and piston kit for rebuilding the front fixed caliper to restore hydraulic integrity and prevent fluid leaks.

parts.label: Brake Fluid (DOT 4)
parts.function: High-performance DOT 4 hydraulic fluid filling the brake circuit to transmit pedal force to all four calipers.

parts.label: Brake Caliper Bleeder Valve
parts.function: One-way valve on each caliper used to purge air from the brake hydraulic circuit during bleeding.

parts.label: ABS Hydraulic Unit Mounting Bracket
parts.function: Secures the ABS/PSM hydraulic control unit to the chassis to prevent vibration-induced damage to hydraulic connections.

parts.label: Brake Booster Vacuum Line
parts.function: Supplies engine vacuum to the brake servo booster to maintain pedal assistance under all operating conditions.
